articles.title: BlackRock Digital Assets Head Says Firm’s Ethereum ETF ‘Underwhelming’ Compared to Bitcoin Product: Report
articles.description: The head of digital assets at BlackRock, Robert Mitchnick, is reportedly saying that the spot Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded fund (ETF) launched earlier this year by the global investment giant has attracted a lower volume of inflows relative to a similar Bitcoin (BTC) product. The business publication Fortune cites Mitchnick saying that inflows into BlackRock’s iShares […]

articles.title: Snowden Torches Solana's Centralized Approach to Blockchain
articles.description: Edward Snowden warns Solana's 'faster, cheaper' approach creates dangerous centralization risks for users.

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Price Nears Support: PumpFun Activity Hints at a Potential Surge
articles.description: Solana (SOL) price is down 6% in the last 24 hours, catching the attention of investors. Technical indicators like the Relative Strength Index (RSI) suggest the cryptocurrency may be approaching oversold territory, indicating a possible reversal. Increased activity on Solana’s major application, PumpFun, hints at renewed user engagement that could positively influence SOL’s performance....

articles.title: Snowden calls Solana a centralized chain used for ‘meme coins and scams’
articles.description: Edward Snowden, the former NSA whistleblower, openly criticized the Solana blockchain network for its centralization. Speaking at the Token2049 conference via video link, Snowden expressed concerns about Solanas operational model, describing it as a system vulnerable to manipulation by nation-states and bad actors due to its centralized...

articles.title: Solana Reclaims Weekly DEX Volume Crown from Ethereum Layer One
articles.description: Off the back of renewed memecoin frenzy, Solana has surpassed Ethereum in 7-Day DEX volume.

articles.title: Ripple’s cross-border payment innovations challenge SWIFT dominance
articles.description: Investment banking firm Houlihan Lokey has identified payments technology firm and XRP issuer Ripple as one of the potential challengers to the global banking messaging network Swift. In a market update report from April 2024, the firm mentioned Ripple and some fintech firms as competition to Swift in the cross-border payments category.
